member.name: T:nxm.dist.model.document.brick.price_info_provider
member.summary: brick working on mdoc and providing price informations

member.name: M:nxm.dist.model.document.brick.price_info_provider.get(System.String,nxm.dist.model.IProduct,nxm.sys.model.IBusinessEntity,nxm.sys.model.ICurrency,System.DateTime,System.Boolean)
member.summary: perform request to get price info

member.name: M:nxm.dist.model.document.brick.price_info_provider.get(nxm.biz.data.dist.price_info_request)
member.summary: perform request to get price info

member.name: M:nxm.dist.model.document.brick.price_info_provider._is_in_cache_suitable(nxm.biz.data.dist.price_info_request,nxm.biz.data.dist.price_info_request)
member.summary:
checks if requests are 'equal'
note: this is asymetric - request not specyfing currency, accepts any stored
note: we are operating on 'raw' monikers' to prevent loading referenced objects during comparison since it is executed in loop over collection, which must be invariant

member.name: F:nxm.dist.model.document.brick.price_info_provider.m_arrRequestCache
member.summary: request cache. note: we are storing request with requested rate date, not actual one! (in bank holiday days rates aren't published)

member.name: M:nxm.dist.bo.salesdocumentline._compute_BaseNettoLPCPrice
member.summary: compute BaseNettoLCPrice (list price currency) BaseNettoLCPrice = call general price calculator using document data

member.name: M:nxm.dist.bo.salesdocumentline._compute_FinalNettoLCPrice
member.summary: compute FNCPrice FNCPrice = BNCPrice - PriceDiscount where PriceDiscount = round(BNCPrice * Discount, price-precision)

member.summary: compute VAT by summing lines tax
